_notes: MAST baseline using canonical Webflow brand values per brand.webflow.com/design-guidelines. Per-pitch CMS color fields override the four brand-themed token positions (Primary, Accent, Dark, Light) at hydration time. These defaults only show in the unhydrated state and on non-pitch project pages. Headings use Poppins Semibold (Google fallback for WF Visual Sans), body uses Inter Regular (Google fallback for WF Visual Sans Text). Skill creates a single FontFamily variable, so primary font is Inter; Poppins variable added manually as a follow-up after skill completes.
